---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it maps to an existing subsystem (agent, tools,
safety, prompt, session, stream), mention which.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps (examples, links).
